title: Your Body is a Light Source!

scenes.text: Did you know your body emits visible light?
Humans radiate a small amount of visible light, peaking in brightness at certain times of the day.
This light is too weak for the naked eye, but it’s there!
Our body's light shifts with our mood!
scenes.label: MOOD LIGHTING

scenes.text: Hit follow for your daily dose of wow.

description: Your body doesn’t just reflect light; it actually emits it! Follow for daily facts!
